series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, signed certificates of disposal completed by the Division, any certificates of destruction and any correspondence associated with these records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records shall be maintained on-site for two years from the date of destruction of the records. Then the paper records shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: For any records maintained in machine readable format, the records shall be maintained on-site for two years from the date of destruction of the records. Then the machine readable records shall be destroyed. ; Microform: For any records maintained in microform, the records shall be maintained on-site for two years from the date of destruction of the records. Then the microform shall be destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Recycle
